ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier assigned to the device (e.g., IMEI or serial number) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the device */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Version of the Android operating system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., phone, tablet) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the device was registered in the system */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last date the device was seen or used */,
  "device_storage" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the device */,
  "device_ram" INTEGER /* RAM of the device */,
  "device_processor" TEXT /* Processor information of the device */,
  "device_battery" INTEGER /* Battery capacity of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, admin) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device assignment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the device is assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the device was assigned to the user */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the device was returned (if applicable) */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, active, returned) */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment (e.g., work, personal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_assignments_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being configured */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., security, network) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  "config_category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration (e.g., security, network) */,
  "config_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the configuration (e.g., wifi, vpn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the device */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., app usage, internet activity) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity (e.g., app name, website visited) */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., productivity, entertainment) */,
  "activity_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the activity (e.g., email, browsing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device involved in the incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., security breach, policy violation) */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "incident_details" TEXT /* Details of the incident */,
  "incident_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., security, policy) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
